column6: anterograde tracer injection described: Area MST had its densest labelling in layer IV followed by I III and VI respectively.. These patterns of label are consistent with a feedforward pattern and suggest that areas 7a and MST lie above area LIP in the cortical hierarchy.

In all cases there was label in the posterior and dorsal aspect of area MST although again it is unclear if this is due to diffusion away from the injection site. One indication that this may not be a diffusion artifact is that none of the numerous visual areas known to connect to areas MST and 7a were labelled
